result.overall_summary: Application form for Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) to apply for housing assistance under the rural housing scheme in Madhya Pradesh.. Fill in the details in the sections below. If any part is unclear, listen to the audio guide.

pages.document_purpose: Application form for Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) to apply for housing assistance under the rural housing scheme in Madhya Pradesh.
pages.page_summary: This is the application form for the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) in Madhya Pradesh. It is used by applicants to apply for housing assistance under the rural housing scheme. The form must be submitted through CSC/E-Mitra centers, Gram Sevaks, Tag Officers, or Panchayat Samiti offices. The applicant must not own a pucca house and must meet eligibility criteria based on the SECC-2011 priority list.
pages.simple_explanation: This form is for rural people in Madhya Pradesh to apply for a new house under the government's housing scheme. You must not have a pucca house already and must meet the rules of the SECC-2011 list.
pages.action_guide:
1. Fill the form carefully with correct details.
2. Attach required documents like Aadhaar, job card, bank passbook, and caste certificate (if applicable).
3. Submit the form at CSC/E-Mitra center, Gram Panchayat, or Panchayat Samiti office.
4. Keep a copy of the submitted form for your records.

fields.what_to_fill: No need to fill. This is the title of the form.
fields.why_it_matters: This tells you the name of the scheme you are applying for.

fields.what_to_fill: No need to fill. This is the name of the housing scheme.
fields.why_it_matters: This tells you the name of the scheme you are applying for.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your Gram Panchayat. (जैसे: ग्राम पंचायत 'ढाणीपुर', 'मोहल्ला चौकी')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know where you live and where to send your application.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your Panchayat Samiti. (जैसे: 'सिहोर विकासखण्ड', 'भोपाल जनपद')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know the administrative block for your application.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your caste category. Choose one from: अनुसूचित जाति (SC), अनुसूचित जनजाति (ST), अल्पसंख्यक (Minority), अन्य पिछड़ा वर्ग (OBC), अन्य (General).
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government check if you are eligible for caste-based benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your title: श्री (Mr.), श्रीमती (Mrs.), सुश्री (Miss).
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government address you correctly in official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your full name as per government records. (जैसे: 'रामलाल', 'सीता बाई')
fields.why_it_matters: This is your identity in the government records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your father's or husband's name. (जैसे: 'रामनारायण', 'श्यामलाल')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify your identity and family details.

fields.field_name: Head of family name as per SECC-2011
fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the head of your family as per the SECC-2012 list. (जैसे: 'गणेश', 'मीना बाई')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government check if you are eligible for housing assistance.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your relationship with the head of the family. (जैसे: 'पुत्र', 'पत्नी', 'पुत्री')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government understand your role in the family.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your TIN number as per the SECC-2011 list. If you don't have it, leave blank.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify your eligibility for the scheme.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your 12-digit Aadhaar number. If you don't have it, leave blank.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify your identity and link your records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your NREGA job card number. If you don't have it, leave blank.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify your employment and eligibility.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM) ID number. If you don't have it, leave blank.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify your eligibility for sanitation benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your Mamashah card number. If you don't have it, leave blank.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify your identity and eligibility.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your priority serial number from the SECC-2011 list.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government check your eligibility for housing assistance.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your name again if you are applying as a disabled person. (जैसे: 'रामलाल', 'सीता बाई')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify your identity and disability status.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your full address including Mohalla, Dhani, or Magra. (जैसे: 'ढाणी 2, मोहल्ला चौकी', 'मगरा 3, ग्राम पंचायत')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government locate your home for verification and delivery of benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your village. (जैसे: 'ढाणीपुर', 'बड़ागाँव')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know your exact location.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the short name of your Gram Panchayat. (जैसे: 'ढाणीपुर ग्राम पंचायत', 'मोहल्ला चौकी')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know your administrative unit.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your post office. (जैसे: 'ढाणीपुर डाकघर', 'मोहल्ला चौकी')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know your postal address.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your block (Panchayat Samiti). (जैसे: 'सिहोर विकासखण्ड', 'भोपाल जनपद')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know your administrative block.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your district. (जैसे: 'सीहोर', 'भोपाल')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know your location in the state.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your mobile number. If you don't have one, write a neighbor's or relative's number.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government contact you for updates on your application.

fields.what_to_fill: Write a neighbor's or relative's mobile number if you don't have one.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government contact someone in case they cannot reach you.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the person who owns the land where you plan to build. (जैसे: 'रामलाल', 'सीता बाई')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify land ownership and eligibility.

fields.field_name: Details of land for construction (if not in applicant's name)
fields.what_to_fill: Write details of the land where you plan to build if it is not in your name. (जैसे: 'कृषि भूमि, खसरा नंबर 123, ग्राम ढाणीपुर')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government verify land ownership and eligibility.
fields.example: कृषि भूमि, खसरा नंबर 123, ग्राम ढाणीपुर
fields.source: यदि निर्माण स्थल की जमीन का पट्टा आवेदक के नाम नहीं है तो विवाद रहित प्रस्तावित निर्माण स्थल की भूमि (कृषि भूमि/आबादी भूमि) का ब्यौरा :- _________________________

fields.what_to_fill: Write your CBS bank account number. (जैसे: '123456789012')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government transfer housing assistance money directly to your account.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your bank branch. (जैसे: 'ढाणीपुर शाखा', 'मोहल्ला चौकी शाखा')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know where your account is located.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the IFSC code of your bank branch. (जैसे: 'SBIN0001234')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government transfer money to the correct bank branch.

fields.what_to_fill: Sign your name in the space provided. If you cannot sign, use your thumb impression.
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms that you agree with the details in the form.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your name again under the signature space.
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms your identity in the signature section.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when you submit the form. (जैसे: '15/05/2024')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps the government know when you applied for housing assistance.
fields.source: सम्पूर्ण आवेदन ग्रामसेवक/ई–मित्र/टैग अधिकारी/पंचायत समिति को प्रस्तुत करने का दिनांक _________________________

fields.what_to_fill: No need to fill. This is for the office use only.
fields.why_it_matters: This is for the government office to record who received your application.

warnings: Do not lie about your income, land, or house ownership. If caught, you may lose the benefit and face legal action.
Attach all required documents like Aadhaar, job card, bank passbook, and caste certificate (if applicable). Missing documents will delay your application.
Submit the form only at authorized centers like CSC/E-Mitra, Gram Panchayat, or Panchayat Samiti office. Do not submit to unauthorized persons.
Keep a copy of the submitted form and receipt for your records. This will help you track your application status.
Recovered 9 fields from layout that were missed by analysis.
Verification: Field 'Form title' cites source 'प्रपत्र-24(1/1) (प्रपत्र -1(अ) नवीन आवास हेतु)' which was not in the retrieved guidelines.
[WARNING] Gram Panchayat name: PAN must be 10 characters: 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter (e.g. ABCDE1234F). Format: ABCDE1234F
[WARNING] Aadhaar number: Aadhar number must be exactly 12 digits (e.g. 1234 5678 9012). Format: XXXX XXXX XXXX
[WARNING] Applicant's mobile number: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits starting with 6-9. Format: 98XXXXXXXX
[WARNING] CBS bank account number: Bank account number is typically 9-18 digits. Double-check with your passbook. Format: XXXXXXXXX to XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
[WARNING] IFSC code: IFSC code must be 11 characters: 4 letters, 0, then 6 alphanumeric (e.g. SBIN0001234). Format: XXXX0XXXXXX
[WARNING] Applicant's signature: Signature must match your official records. Use thumb impression if unable to sign.
pages.original_markdown:
प्रपत्र-24(1/1)
(प्रपत्र -1(अ) नवीन आवास हेतु)

# प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना–ग्रामीण का आवेदन–पत्र
(आवेदक द्वारा सहायता राशि हेतु आवेदन पत्र ग्रामसेवक/टैग अधिकारी/ई–मित्र आदि के माध्यम से)

ग्राम पंचायत _________________________ पंचायत समिति _________________________
प्रार्थी का वर्ग (अनु.जाति/अनु.जन जाति/अल्पसंख्यक/ओबीसी/अन्य) _________________________
(परिवार की महिला मुखिया के नाम से आवास स्वीकृत किया जावें।)

![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)

(पंचायत समिति के प्रशासनिक स्वीकृति आदेश कमांक _________________________ दिनांक _________________________ क्र.सं _________________________ के क्रम में)

पात्रता :– SECC-2011 के आधार पर तैयार की गई वरीयता सूची, जिन्होंने पूर्व में किसी भी योजनान्तर्गत आवास हेतु अनुदान सहायता प्राप्त नहीं की है तथा वर्तमान में पक्का आवास नहीं है)

1. आवेदक का नाम– श्री/श्रीमती/सुश्री _________________________
2. पति/पिता का नाम _________________________
3. SECC-2011 की वरीयता सूची में दर्ज परिवार के मुखिया का नाम _________________________ आवेदक का परिवार के मुखिया से सम्बन्ध _________________________
4. (ए) SECC-2011 में आवेदक का TIN No. _________________________ (बी) आधार संख्या (यदि उपलब्ध हों) _________________________ (सी) जॉबकार्ड नं _________________________ (डी) एसबीएम आईडी नं. _________________________ (ई) मामाशाह कार्ड नं. _________________________
5. आवेदक का SECC-2011 के अनुसार वरीयता क्रमांक _________________________
6. आवेदक _________________________ (यदि दिव्यांग है तो विकलांग का प्रमाण पत्र संलग्न करें)
7. पूर्ण पता (मोहल्ला/ढाणी/मगरा) _________________________
8. ग्राम _________________________ ग्रा.पं. _________________________ पोस्ट _________________________ पंस. _________________________ जिला _________________________
9. प्रार्थी का मोबाइल नं. _________________________ स्वयं का मो. नं. नहीं होने पर पड़ोसी/रिश्तेदार का मोबाइल नं. _________________________
10. पट्टा धारक का पूरा नाम _________________________
11. यदि निर्माण स्थल की जमीन का पट्टा आवेदक के नाम नहीं है तो विवाद रहित प्रस्तावित निर्माण स्थल की भूमि (कृषि भूमि/आबादी भूमि) का ब्यौरा :- _________________________
12. प्रस्तावित जमीन – चारागाह/जोहड़ पायतान/राजकीय भूमि पर अतिक्रमण का स्थल नहीं है।
13. सीबीएस आधारित बैंक का खाता संख्या _________________________ शाखा _________________________ आईएफएससी कोड _________________________ (पास बुक की फोटो प्रति संलग्न करें)
14. मैं/मेरे परिवार के सदस्यों ने पूर्व में किसी भी योजना में आवास हेतु अनुदान सहायता प्राप्त नहीं की है, व वर्तमान में पक्का मकान नहीं है एवं निम्न सुविधाएं मेरे पास उपलब्ध नहीं है :-
1) मोटर साईकिल डुपहिया/तिपहिया/चौपहिया वाहन/मच्छली नाव – नहीं है।
2) मेकेनाईज्ड तिपहिया/चौपहिया वाहन कृषि उपकरण – नहीं है।
3) किसान कैंडिट कार्ड, कैंडिट सीमा के साथ 50 हजार या उससे अधिक का – नहीं है।
4) परिवार का कोई सदस्य सरकारी कर्मचारी – नहीं है।
5) परिवार के गैर कृषि उद्यमों का सरकार के साथ पंजीकृत – नहीं है।
6) परिवार के किसी भी सदस्य की आय अधिकतम रुपये 10 हजार प्रति माह – नहीं है।
7) इन्कमटैक्स – नहीं देता हूँ।
8) व्यावसायिक कर – नहीं देता हूँ।
9) स्वयं का रेफ्रिजरेटर – नहीं है।
10) स्वयं का लेप्पडलाईन फोन – नहीं है।
11) स्वयं 2.5 एकड़ या अधिक सिंचित भूमि के साथ एक सिंचित उपकरण – नहीं है।
12) 5 एकड़ या अधिक सिंचित भूमि के लिए दो या अधिक फसल मौसम – नहीं है।
13) मालिक 7.5 एकड़ भूमि या अधिक, एक सिंचाई उपकरण के साथ – नहीं है।
14) किसी भी सरकारी योजना में आवास निर्माण हेतु मेरे परिवार के पक्ष में आदिनांक तक कोई स्वीकृति जारी नहीं हुई है अथवा कोई पक्का मकान आवंटन – नहीं है।
15. सरकार द्वारा नवीन आवास हेतु निर्धारित अनुदान सहायता राशि से मैं न्यूनतम 25 वर्गमीटर प्लिंथ क्षेत्र का नवीन पक्का आवास निर्माण अधिकतम 12 माह की अवधि में पूर्ण कराने के लिए वचनबद्ध हूँ। आवासीय अनुदान सहायता से अधिक होने वाले व्यय की व्यवस्था में अपने स्तर पर स्वयं करूंगा।

संलग्न :-
(1.) सीबीएस बैंक खाता पासबुक की फोटो प्रति। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)
(2.) प्रस्तावित जमीन से सम्बन्धित दस्तावेज की प्रति। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)
(3.) नरेगा जॉब कार्ड एवं आधार कार्ड की प्रति (यदि उपलब्ध हो)। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)
(4.) दिव्यांग हो तो प्रमाण पत्र की प्रति। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)

आवेदक के हस्ताक्षर
(नाम _________________________)

सम्पूर्ण आवेदन ग्रामसेवक/ई–मित्र/टैग अधिकारी/पंचायत समिति को प्रस्तुत करने का दिनांक _________________________
–: प्राप्ति रसीद :–
श्री/श्रीमती/सुश्री _________________________ पुत्री/पुत्र/पत्नी श्री _________________________ ग्रा.पं. _________________________ का प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना–ग्रामीण हेतु आवेदन (प्रपत्र–1) मय फोटो एवं संलग्न विवरण दिनांक _________________________ को प्राप्त किया।

हस्ताक्षर प्राप्तकर्ता

\Radhey\e\Panchayat Samiti 2019-20\PMAY-G 2019\PMAY-G Prapatra.doc

\u0939\u0938\u094d\u0924\u093e\u0915\u09.title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
\u0939\u0938\u094d\u0924\u093e\u0915\u09.description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.

\u092a\u094d\u0930\u093e\u0930\u094d\u09.title: Caste Certificate (MP)
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u093e\u0930\u094d\u09.description: Caste certificates in MP are issued by the Sub-Divisional Officer. Non-Creamy Layer status for OBCs must be updated every 3 years (MP Specific rule).

\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.title: Self-Declaration (MP SV-Ghoshna)
\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.description: In Madhya Pradesh, most services no longer require an affidavit on stamp paper; a simple self-declaration (Swa-ghoshna) is legally valid for income and domicile.

\u092a\u091f\u094d\u091f\u093e \u0927\u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u092a\u091f\u094d\u091f\u093e \u0927\u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u092a\u0942\u0930\u094d\u0923 \u092a\u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u092a\u0942\u0930\u094d\u0923 \u092a\u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

(\u0928\u093e\u092e.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
(\u0928\u093e\u092e.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u092a\u0924\u093f/\u092a\u093f\u0924\u0.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u092a\u0924\u093f/\u092a\u093f\u0924\u0.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

pages.document_purpose: This page is part of the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G) application form for rural housing approval. It includes two sections: (1) A certification section by the Gram Sevak or Tag Officer for housing approval, and (2) A financial sanction section by the Panchayat Samiti office.
pages.page_summary: The page has two main parts. The first part is for the Gram Sevak or Tag Officer to certify the applicant's eligibility for housing under PMAY-G. The second part is for the Panchayat Samiti office to sanction financial assistance for housing construction.
pages.translation: This page is for office use only. It has two sections: one for the Gram Sevak or Tag Officer to verify the applicant's details, and another for the Panchayat Samiti office to approve financial aid for housing.
pages.simple_explanation: This page is used by government officers to check and approve your application for a new house under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G). You do not need to fill this page yourself.
pages.action_guide: This page is for government officers only. Do not fill it yourself. If you are an applicant, submit your application at CSC/E-Mitra center, Tag Officer, Gram Panchayat office, or Panchayat Samiti office. For complaints, call 9116057308 on WhatsApp/SMS/phone.

fields.field_name: केवल कार्यालय उपयोग हेतु (Office Use Only)
fields.what_to_fill: Leave this section blank. It is for government officers only.
fields.why_it_matters: This section is for official use to track the application process.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this section blank. It is for government officers only.
fields.why_it_matters: This section is for official use to approve financial assistance for housing.

fields.field_name: प्रमाणित किया जाता है कि श्रीमती/श्री/सुश्री (Name of applicant)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the applicant (e.g., रीता देवी).
fields.why_it_matters: This is the applicant's name for identity verification.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the relation of the applicant to the person mentioned (e.g., पत्नी, पिता, पुत्री).
fields.why_it_matters: This shows the applicant's relationship to the head of the family.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the applicant's category (e.g., अनुसूचित जाति, अनुसूचित जनजाति, अल्पसंख्यक, ओबीसी, अन्य).
fields.why_it_matters: This determines eligibility for government benefits.

fields.field_name: SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची TIN NO (SECC-2011 Priority List TIN Number)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the TIN number from the SECC-2011 priority list (e.g., 1234567890).
fields.why_it_matters: This number links the applicant to the SECC-2011 priority list for housing benefits.

fields.field_name: SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक (SECC-2011 Priority List Serial Number)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number from the SECC-2011 priority list (e.g., 54321).
fields.why_it_matters: This number confirms the applicant's position in the priority list.

fields.field_name: सीबीएस आधारित बैंक खाता संख्या (CBS Bank Account Number)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the 15-18 digit bank account number linked to Aadhaar (e.g., 12345678901234567).
fields.why_it_matters: This is where the housing grant money will be transferred.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the bank where the account is held (e.g., स्टेट बैंक ऑफ इंडिया, पंजाब नेशनल बैंक).
fields.why_it_matters: This identifies the bank for transferring the grant money.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the bank branch (e.g., गांधी चौक शाखा, मुख्य बाजार शाखा).
fields.why_it_matters: This identifies the exact branch for transferring the grant money.

fields.field_name: प्रार्थी द्वारा आवेदन पत्र प्रस्तुत करने की दिनांक (Date of application submission)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the application was submitted (e.g., 15/05/2024).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms when the application was filed for housing benefits.
fields.source: Text: 'प्रार्थी द्वारा आवेदन पत्र प्रस्तुत करने की दिनांक ……………… तक'

fields.field_name: ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ संख्या (Page number of Gram Panchayat register)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the page number in the Gram Panchayat register where the applicant's name is recorded (e.g., 45).
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official record of the applicant's application.
fields.source: Text: 'ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ संख्या ………………'

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number of the applicant's entry in the Gram Panchayat register (e.g., 12).
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official record number for the applicant's application.

fields.field_name: हस्ताक्षर टैग अधिकारी (Signature of Tag Officer)
fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Tag Officer will sign here.
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the officer's verification of the applicant's details.

fields.field_name: नाम व पद (Name and designation of Tag Officer)
fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Tag Officer will write their name and designation here.
fields.why_it_matters: This identifies the officer who verified the application.

fields.field_name: हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक पदेन सचिव (Signature of Gram Sevak)
fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Gram Sevak will sign here.
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the Gram Sevak's verification of the application.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Gram Sevak will write their name here.
fields.why_it_matters: This identifies the Gram Sevak who verified the application.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Gram Sevak will stamp the seal here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official stamp of the Gram Panchayat.

fields.field_name: श्री/श्रीमती (Name of applicant in Panchayat Samiti section)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the applicant (e.g., राम लाल).
fields.why_it_matters: This is the applicant's name for the Panchayat Samiti's records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the father's or husband's name of the applicant (e.g., शिव राम).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the applicant's identity and family details.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the applicant's caste (e.g., यादव, कुर्मी, ब्राह्मण).
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for government records and benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the applicant's category (e.g., अनुसूचित जाति, अनुसूचित जनजाति, ओबीसी, सामान्य).
fields.why_it_matters: This determines eligibility for government benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the village where the applicant lives (e.g., ढाणीपुर, मोहल्ला चौकी).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the applicant's address for housing benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Gram Panchayat (e.g., ग्राम पंचायत ढाणीपुर, ग्राम पंचायत मोहल्ला चौकी).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the applicant's Gram Panchayat for housing benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Panchayat Samiti (e.g., पंचायत समिति सीहोर, पंचायत समिति भोपाल).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the applicant's Panchayat Samiti for housing benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the district (e.g., सीहोर, भोपाल, जबलपुर).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the applicant's district for housing benefits.

fields.field_name: SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक (SECC-2011 Priority List Serial Number in Panchayat Samiti section)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number from the SECC-2011 priority list (e.g., 54321).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the applicant's position in the priority list for housing benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the scheme (e.g., प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना-ग्रामीण).
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the scheme under which the grant is sanctioned.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the grant amount sanctioned (e.g., 120000).
fields.why_it_matters: This is the amount approved for housing construction.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Development Officer will write the reference number and date here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official record of the sanction order.

fields.field_name: विकास अधिकारी पं. सं (Development Officer's reference number)
fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Development Officer will write their reference number here.
fields.why_it_matters: This identifies the Development Officer who sanctioned the grant.

warnings: This page is for government officers only. Do not fill it yourself.
If you are an applicant, submit your application at CSC/E-Mitra center, Tag Officer, Gram Panchayat office, or Panchayat Samiti office.
For complaints, call 9116057308 on WhatsApp/SMS/phone.
Providing false information in this form can lead to legal action and cancellation of benefits.
Verification: Field 'केवल कार्यालय उपयोग हेतु (Office Use Only)' cites source 'Page header text' which was not in the retrieved guidelines.
[WARNING] कार्यालय पंचायत समिति (Panchayat Samiti Office): PAN must be 10 characters: 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter (e.g. ABCDE1234F). Format: ABCDE1234F
[WARNING] सीबीएस आधारित बैंक खाता संख्या (CBS Bank Account Number): Bank account number is typically 9-18 digits. Double-check with your passbook. Format: XXXXXXXXX to XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
[WARNING] हस्ताक्षर टैग अधिकारी (Signature of Tag Officer): Signature must match your official records. Use thumb impression if unable to sign.
pages.original_markdown:
नोट :- उक्त आवेदन पत्र CSC/E-Mitra केन्द्र, टैग अधिकारी, कार्यालय ग्राम पंचायत अथवा कार्यालय पंचायत समिति में से किसी भी एक जगह जमा कराया जा सकेगा। शिकायत/समस्या हेतु पंचायत समिति/जिला परिषद् कार्यालय अथवा राज्य स्तरीय मोबाइल नम्बर 9116057308 पर Whatsapp/SMS/phone करें।

# केवल कार्यालय उपयोग हेतु

प्रपत्र—24(1/2)
(प्रपत्र —1(ब) नवीन आवास हेतु स्वीकृति)

## ग्राम सेवक अथवा आवास हेतु नियुक्त टैग अधिकारी (पंचायत/प्रगति/उद्योग प्रसार अधिकारी, एईएन, जेईएन, जेटीए, ग्राम रोजगार सहायक आदि अन्य राजकीय कर्मचारी/अधिकारी) द्वारा आवास स्वीकृति हेतु प्रमाणीकरण

प्रमाणित किया जाता है कि श्रीमती/श्री/सुश्री ………………………………………… पत्नी/पिता/पुत्री …………………………वर्ग (अनु. जाति/अनु.जन जाति/अल्पसंख्यक/ओबीसी/अन्य) …………………… SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची TIN NO ………………का नाम SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक …………………………… पर दर्ज है। सीबीएस आधारित बैंक खाता संख्या …………………… (बैंक) ………………………… शाखा ………………………… में हैं। प्रार्थी द्वारा आवेदन पत्र प्रस्तुत करने की दिनांक ……………… तक आवेदक का कोई पक्का आवास नहीं है। पूर्व में किसी भी राज्य/केन्द्र प्रवर्तित योजना में आवास हेतु अनुदान सहायता प्राप्त नहीं की है साथ ही बिन्दु संख्या 14 में अंकित समस्त शर्तों का सत्यापन कर लिया गया है। प्रार्थी प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना—ग्रामीण हेतु पात्र हैं। आवेदन मय फोटो एवं सलंग्न दस्तावेजों की एक—एक फोटो प्रति ग्राम पंचायत की पत्रावली में रख ली है एवं ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ संख्या ………………पर क्र.सं ……………… पर नाम दर्ज कर लिया है। फोटो सहित मूल आवेदन (प्रपत्र—1) एवं सलंग्न दस्तावेजों को पंचायत समिति में स्वीकृति हेतु प्रस्तुत कर दिया है। आवास निर्माण हेतु प्रस्तावित जमीन चरागाह/जोहड़, पायतन/राजकीय भूमि पर अतिक्रमण का स्थल नहीं हैं। प्रार्थी का फोटो व हस्ताक्षर प्रमाणित किये जाते हैं।

(भूमिहीन पात्र लाभार्थियों की स्वीकृती जारी कर आवासीय भूमि उपलब्ध कराने की नियमानुसार कार्यवाही की जावें। अपात्र के लिए लाल स्याही से मोटे अक्षरों में नोट अंकित कर दिनांक सहित हस्ताक्षर करें)

|  हस्ताक्षर टैग अधिकारी
(पंचायत/प्रगति/उद्योग प्रसार अधिकारी, एईएन, जेईएन, जेटीए, ग्राम रोजगार सहायक आदि अन्य राजकीय कर्मचारी/अधिकारी)
नाम व पद:……………………………………………………………………………………………………… | हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक पदेन सचिव
(नाम …………………………………………)
सील  |
| --- | --- |

---

### कार्यालय पंचायत समिति

श्री/श्रीमती ………………………………………… पिता/पति ………………………………………… जाति ………………………………………… वर्ग ………………………………………… निवासी ग्राम ………………………………………… ग्राम पंचायत ………………………………………… पंचायत समिति ………………………………………… जिला ………………………………………… SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक …………………………के आवेदन पत्र एवं ग्राम सेवक की प्राप्त रिपोर्ट, मूल आवेदन (प्रपत्र—1) फोटो सहित संलग्न दस्तावेज के आधार पर ………………………… योजना के अन्तर्गत राशि रु. …………………………की अनुदान सहायता की वित्तीय स्वीकृति एतद् द्वारा प्रदान की जाती है। मूल आवेदन पत्र का Aawas Soft पर Registration कर दस्तावेज पंचायत समिति की पत्रावली में रख लिये गये है एवं पंचायत समिति के रिकार्ड व रजिस्टर में विवरण दर्ज कर लिया है ।

क्रमांक:/दिनांक…………………………

विकास अधिकारी
पं. सं………………………………………………………………………………………………………

---

### नोट :-

1. आवेदक के अपात्र पाये जाने पर प्रशासनिक स्वीकृति निरस्त कर आवेदक को सूचित जावेंगा।
2. पंचायत समिति द्वारा स्वीकृति के साथ महात्मा गांधी नरेगा की मस्टररोल जारी की जावेगी एवं कार्य शुरू करने के पश्चात् प्रथम किश्त की राशि लाभार्थी के बचत खाते में जमा होने की तिथि के तत्काल बाद न्यूनतम 25 वर्ग मीटर प्लिंथ क्षेत्र का नवीन पक्का आवास निर्माण कार्य अधिकतम 12 माह की अवधि में पूर्ण करना होगा।

\\Radhey\w\Panchayat Samiti 2019-20\PMAY-G 2019\PMAY-G Prapatra.doc

\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u0915\u0947\u0935\u0932 \u0915\u093e\u0.title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
\u0915\u0947\u0935\u0932 \u0915\u093e\u0.description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.

pages.document_purpose: This page is a utility certificate for the second installment of housing grant under Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) in Madhya Pradesh. It certifies that the first installment was used correctly for house construction and recommends releasing the second installment.
pages.page_summary: This page certifies the proper use of the first installment of housing grant money. It confirms that the house construction is 25 square meters up to plinth level and recommends releasing the second installment. It also includes a declaration by the Gram Sevak or authorized officer and requires a photo of the beneficiary with the house.
pages.simple_explanation: This is a legal proof that the first installment of your housing grant was used correctly. You must sign this to get the second installment. A government officer will verify your house and sign here.
pages.action_guide: 1. Fill all blank spaces with correct details. 2. Attach a 6x4 inch photo of you with your house. 3. Get it signed by the Gram Sevak or authorized government officer. 4. Submit to the Panchayat Samiti office.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's name (like: रामलाल, सीता बाई)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the name of the person who will receive the housing grant.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the relation of the beneficiary (like: पत्नी, पुत्र)
fields.why_it_matters: This shows how the beneficiary is related to the person mentioned in the form.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's caste category (like: अनुसूचित जाति, अन्य पिछड़ा वर्ग)
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to check if you are eligible for government schemes.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the SECC-2011 priority list number (like: 1234567890)
fields.why_it_matters: This is your unique number in the SECC-2011 list for housing schemes.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your village (like: ढाणीपुर, मोहल्ला चौकी)
fields.why_it_matters: This is your village name for official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your Gram Panchayat (like: ग्राम पंचायत ढाणीपुर)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the local governing body for your village.

fields.field_name: जिला परिषद/पंचायत समिति की वित्तीय स्वीकृति आदेश क्रमांक
fields.what_to_fill: Write the financial sanction order number (like: 123/2023)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official order number for your housing grant sanction.
fields.source: Page text: 'जिला परिषद/पंचायत समिति की वित्तीय स्वीकृति आदेश क्रमांक ...'

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date of the financial sanction order (like: 15/05/2023)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the date when your housing grant was approved.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number of the sanction order (like: 456)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the unique number for tracking your application.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the amount of the first installment (like: 50000)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the grant money you received for house construction.
fields.source: Page text: 'प्रथम किश्त की हस्तान्तरित अनुदान सहायता राशि रु ...'

fields.what_to_fill: Write your savings bank account number (like: 123456789012)
fields.why_it_matters: This is where the grant money was deposited.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your bank (like: स्टेट बैंक ऑफ इंडिया, पंजाब नेशनल बैंक)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the bank where your account is held.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the location of your bank branch (like: गांधी चौक, मोहल्ला चौकी)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the branch where your account is held.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the money was deposited in your bank (like: 20/05/2023)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the date when you received the first installment.
fields.source: Page text: 'में दिनांक ... को जमा हुई थी।'

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the officer verified your house (like: 25/05/2023)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the date when the government officer checked your house construction.
fields.source: Page text: 'मैंने लाभार्थी के आवास का भौतिक सत्यापन मौके पर दिनांक ... को कर लिया है'

fields.what_to_fill: Write the muster roll number for NREGA work (like: 789)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the work record number for NREGA labor payments.

fields.field_name: ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ संख्या
fields.what_to_fill: Write the page number of the Gram Panchayat register (like: 15)
fields.why_it_matters: This is where your application details are recorded in the official register.
fields.source: Page text: 'ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ ... पर'

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number in the register (like: 101)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the entry number for your application in the official register.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the certificate is submitted (like: 30/05/2023)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the date when you submit this form to the Panchayat Samiti.
fields.source: Page text: 'पं.स. में दिनांक ...को जमा करवाई जा रही हैं'

fields.field_name: हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक / अधिकृत टैग अधिकारी
fields.what_to_fill: Leave blank for the officer to sign. Do not fill this.
fields.why_it_matters: This is for the government officer to sign after verifying your house.
fields.source: Page text: 'हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक / अधिकृत टैग अधिकारी (केवल राजकीय अधिकारी/कर्मचारी)'

fields.what_to_fill: Leave blank for the officer's name. Do not fill this.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the name of the government officer who verifies your house.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave blank for the officer's seal. Do not fill this.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official stamp of the government officer.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave blank for the date of signing. Do not fill this.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the date when the officer signs the certificate.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Panchayat Samiti office (like: पंचायत समिति सागर, पंचायत समिति भोपाल)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the office that will approve your second installment.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's name again (like: रामलाल, सीता बाई)
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the beneficiary's name for the second installment approval.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the father's/husband's name (like: रामलाल, मोहनलाल)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the name of the beneficiary's father or husband.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's caste (like: यादव, गुप्ता)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the caste name for official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the beneficiary's village (like: ढाणीपुर, मोहल्ला चौकी)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the village where the beneficiary lives.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Gram Panchayat (like: ग्राम पंचायत ढाणीपुर)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the local governing body for the beneficiary's village.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Panchayat Samiti (like: पंचायत समिति सागर)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the higher governing body for the Gram Panchayat.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the district (like: सागर, भोपाल)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the district where the beneficiary lives.

fields.field_name: SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक (कार्यालय पंचायत समिति)
fields.what_to_fill: Write the SECC-2011 priority list number again (like: 1234567890)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the unique number for the beneficiary in the SECC-2011 list.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the sanction order number and date for the second installment (like: 789/2023, 01/06/2023)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official order for releasing the second installment.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the amount of the second installment (like: 50000)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the grant money you will receive for the second phase of construction.
fields.source: Page text: 'द्वितीय किश्त की राशि रु. ...'

fields.what_to_fill: Write the PAN card number of the development officer (like: ABCDE1234F)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the PAN number of the officer signing the certificate.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number and date for the Panchayat Samiti office (like: 101, 05/06/2023)
fields.why_it_matters: This is the tracking number for your application in the Panchayat Samiti office.

fields.field_name: प्रथम किश्त का उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र
fields.what_to_fill: Please enter your details clearly here. (e.g. 'John Doe', 'Sector 5')
fields.why_it_matters: This info is essential for document completion.

warnings: This is a legal document. Filling false information can lead to legal action and cancellation of your housing grant.
You must attach a 6x4 inch photo of yourself with your house (up to plinth level) certified by the Gram Sevak.
The second installment will be released only after you complete the roof and toilet construction within 4 months of receiving the money.
If the government officer is not a government employee, the Gram Sevak will verify and sign this form.
Recovered 1 fields from layout that were missed by analysis.
Verification: Field 'लाभार्थी श्री/श्रीमती' cites source 'Page text: 'लाभार्थी श्री/श्रीमती ... पत्नी/पुत्र ...'' which was not in the retrieved guidelines.
pages.original_markdown:
प्रपत्र-24(2)
(प्रपत्र –2 द्वितीय किश्त हेतु उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र)

# (उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र)
## प्रथम किश्त का उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र

लाभार्थी श्री/श्रीमती ... पत्नी/पुत्र ... वर्ग (अनु.जाति/अनु.जन जाति/अल्पसंख्यक/ओबीसी/अन्य) ... SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक ... ग्राम ... ग्रा.पं. ... को जिला परिषद/पंचायत समिति की वित्तीय स्वीकृति आदेश क्रमांक ... दिनांक ...के क्र.सं. ... के द्वारा नवीन आवास निर्माण हेतु प्रथम किश्त की हस्तान्तरित अनुदान सहायता राशि रु ... इनके बचत खाता संख्या ... बैंक (नाम) ... स्थान ... में दिनांक ... को जमा हुई थी। मैंने लाभार्थी के आवास का भौतिक सत्यापन मौके पर दिनांक ... को कर लिया है, निर्माणाधीन आवास स्थल चारागाह /जोहड़ पायतन/राजकीय भूमि पर अतिक्रमण का स्थान नहीं है। नवीन आवास का निर्माण 25 वर्ग मीटर में कुर्सी स्तर तक पूर्ण कर लिया गया है।

इस प्रकार प्रथम किश्त की अनुदान सहायता राशि का पूर्ण उपयोग कर लिया गया है। अत: लाभार्थी को द्वितीय किश्त जारी करने की अनुशंसा की जाती है। निर्माणाधीन आवास का Geo Tagged फोटो प्रमाणित किया जाता है। उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र की एक फोटो प्रति ग्राम पंचायत की पत्रावली में रख ली है एवं ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ ... पर क्र.सं ... पर दर्ज कर कुर्सी स्तर तक नव निर्मित आवास के साथ लाभार्थी का फोटो सहित उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र पं.स. में दिनांक ...को जमा करवाई जा रही हैं एवं महात्मा गांधी नरेगा अन्तर्गत जारी स्वीकृति के क्रम में उक्त निर्माण कार्य के विरुद्ध जारी मस्टररोल संख्या ... भुगतान हेतु जमा करा दिया है।

* मोबाइल आवास एप के माध्यम से Geo Tagged फोटो अपलोड किये जाने पर फोटो चिपकाना आवश्यक नहीं
कुर्सी स्तर तक नव निर्मित आवास के साथ लाभार्थी का फोटो (साइज- 6 इंच X 4 इंच) ग्राम सेवक द्वारा प्रमाणित

हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक / अधिकृत टैग अधिकारी (केवल राजकीय अधिकारी/कर्मचारी)
(नाम...)
सील
दिनांक ...

नोट:– टैग अधिकारी राजकीय अधिकारी/कर्मचारी नहीं होने पर उक्त प्रमाण पत्र ग्राम सेवक पदेन सचिव द्वारा सत्यापित किया जावेगा।

---

## कार्यालय पंचायत समिति...

श्री/श्रीमती ... पिता/पति ... जाति ... वर्ग ... निवासी ग्राम ... ग्राम पंचायत ... पंचायत समिति ... जिला ... SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक ... के द्वितीय किश्त हेतु उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र एवं ग्राम सेवक की प्राप्त रिपोर्ट के आधार पर मूल आवेदन (प्रपत्र-3) फोटो सहित संलग्न दस्तावेज के आधार पर ...योजना के अन्तर्गत आदेश क्रमांक/दिनांक ... के द्वारा जारी राशि रु ... के उपरान्त द्वितीय किश्त की राशि रु. ... जारी करने की स्वीकृति एतद् द्वारा प्रदान की जाती है। मूल आवेदन पत्र का Aawas Soft पर प्रविष्टि कर दस्तावेज पंचायत समिति की पत्रावली में रख लिये गये है एवं पंचायत समिति के रेकार्ड व रजिस्टर में विवरण दर्ज कर लिया है।

विकास अधिकारी
पं.सं. ...

क्रमांक/दिनांक ...

नोट :- द्वितीय किश्त की राशि लाभार्थी के बचत खाते में जमा होने की तिथि से अधिकतम 4 माह की अवधि में छत का कार्य मय स्वच्छ शौचालय के पूर्ण कराना होगा।

\\Radhey\w\Panchayat Samiti 2019-20\PMAY-G 2019\PMAY-G Prapatra.doc

\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0925\u092e \u0915\u0.title: Voter ID (EPIC - MP)
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0925\u092e \u0915\u0.description: MP election identification proof. Mandatory for casting votes in State and National elections. Form 6 is used for new MP voters, and Form 8 for address changes within the state.

\u0936\u094d\u0930\u0940/\u0936\u094d\u0.title: Ladli Laxmi Yojana (MP)
\u0936\u094d\u0930\u0940/\u0936\u094d\u0.description: Educational and financial security scheme for girl children born in MP after 2006. Provides staggered payments and a final maturity amount at age 21.

\u092a\u0902.\u0938\u0902..title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u092a\u0902.\u0938\u0902..description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.
